name: Scythe of Vyse
description: The most guarded relic among the cult of Vyse, it is the most coveted weapon among magi.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.description: Applies a hex on the unit-targeted enemy upon cast and turns it into a harmless critter. Cooldown: 20. Mana Cost: 250. Cast Range: 800. Set Move Speed: 140. Hex Duration: 2.8. Current Health as Damage: 100%.
